use_cases: Visual feedback for completed actions like form submissions or API calls
Loading-to-success state transitions in dashboards and workflows
Menu toggle animations for mobile and desktop navigation
Status indication in real-time data processing UIs
User action confirmation in transactional interfaces
ai_summary: Animated state icon components that morph between visual states, including a loading spinner transforming into a success checkmark and a hamburger menu icon transitioning to a close X. Built with Framer Motion for smooth morph animations with configurable size, color, duration, and auto-toggle intervals. Perfect for providing clear visual feedback on state changes in SaaS applications and developer tools.
